title: helichrysum opacum
intro: Helichrysum opacum, also known as the Yellow Everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the southern parts of Africa, where it is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, bruises, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum opacum, such as essential oils and tinctures, are commonly used in aromatherapy and homeopathic medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
